overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia jogging through a marshy wilderness area. The character travels along a dirt path through tall grass and reeds, crosses a wooden bridge, and approaches a distant lakeside village with traditional wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy forest trail with tall reeds

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging along a winding dirt path through a marshy forest with tall pines and reeds

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the marsh
dense pine trees lining the path
tall golden reeds growing in the marsh water
mossy rock formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through a narrow marsh trail enclosed by pine forest. The path winds between rock outcrops and dense stands of golden reeds, with dappled sunlight filtering through the trees.

events.description: character steps onto and crosses a wooden plank bridge over marsh water

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing a weathered wooden plank bridge spanning a marshy waterway

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow footbridge
murky water with reeds growing along the banks

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a narrow wooden plank bridge over murky marsh water. The bridge connects two sections of the dirt trail, with reeds visible growing along the water banks on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail between low hills

events.description: passing a dead wolf or dog lying on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging through open grasslands between low hills, passing a fallen animal carcass

notable_agents.action: dead wolf lying on its side in the grass beside the trail

entered.detail: low grassy hills with scattered rocks
low grassy hills with scattered rocks
clusters of white flowers growing along the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the marsh, the scene opens into wide grasslands between low hills. Geralt passes a dead wolf lying beside the trail as the path continues through fields of white wildflowers under a bright open sky.

events.description: brief cut to black then resumes with village buildings visible in the distance
wooden village with church tower becomes clearly visible on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the lakeside path toward a distant wooden village

entered.detail: cluster of traditional wooden houses and a church with a stone tower
calm lake water visible through the trees on the right
weathered wooden fence posts along the path

segments.scene_description: After a brief transition, the path continues toward a lakeside settlement. Traditional wooden buildings and a church tower become visible on the right, with calm lake water beyond. The trail passes weathered wooden fences as it approaches the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded, forested marshland into an open lakeside village. It begins with Geralt jogging along a narrow trail enclosed by pine trees and rock outcrops, where dappled sunlight filters through dense stands of golden reeds. As the path leads forward, the camera follows him across a narrow wooden plank bridge spanning murky marsh water before the terrain opens into wide grasslands and rolling hills. The scene then shifts into bright, open fields of white wildflowers, passing a dead wolf by the trail as the sky clears. Finally, the path winds past weathered wooden fences toward a lakeside settlement, where traditional wooden buildings and a church tower emerge beside the calm water.
